title: Fox Mandal & Co moves Supreme Court in ₹3.9 crore service tax dispute
description: Law firm Fox Mandal & Co has moved the Supreme Court challenging a ₹3.9 crore service tax demand arising from proceedings under the pre-GST regime. [Fox Mandal & Company v. Commissioner]The matter came up briefly before a Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe.Justice PS Narasimha and Justice Alok AradheDuring the hearing, counsel for the petitioner informed the Bench that an important annexure relating to the reconciliation issue was missing from the special leave petition (SLP)
